line2: Coffee for Candice, if you please.
Take poor Snoopy for a pee.
The kids are due, where will snacks be?
Put the kettle on for tea.
A biscuit and a brew will do.
A carrier bag came into view.
A leaf appeared. Emergency.
Snoopy checked behind the door.
Snoopy's still somehow alive.
Nothing happened. Snoopy's done.
Pancakes would be rather fine.
Nutella work is never done.
Nutella vanished from view.
Nutella feels a bit like heaven.
No snack is enough, you see.
Alexandria's pals arrive.
The front room is fully alive.
Laughter comes through the door.
The house begins to come alive.
A snack debate begins with glee.
Gary said drip. The silence grew.
Gary said slay once more.
Gary tried Gen Z tricks.
Nobody knows what rizz should be.
Gary said fire. Nobody's fine.
Time to get soup in your tum.
Sausage rolls don't eat themselves.
Someone has asked for more.
The snack requests begin once more.

Candice has another clue.
Coffee, crossword, one more clue.

Crossword time is looking fine.

The Count returns eventually.

That finding might be worth a line.
